description_long: This is a small, rustic house with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in textured, overlapping shingles. The exterior walls are made of rough, dark stone or stucco, giving it a weathered, old-world appearance. The front features a simple wooden door with a latch, a small shuttered window above, and another window with a flower box to the side. The roof has a prominent stone chimney and the shingles are unevenly colored, adding to the aged look. The back of the house is plain, with no windows or doors visible. The overall design suggests a quaint, storybook cottage, likely found in a rural or historic urban neighborhood.
description: A quaint, rustic stone cottage with a steep shingled roof, wooden door, and shuttered windows. The house has a weathered, old-world charm and a prominent chimney.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden door, two small windows with shutters and flower boxes, and the steep gable roof with chimney.
description_view_1: Side/top view highlighting the textured shingled roof and chimney, with partial visibility of the front window and door.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned stone wall with no windows or doors, and the gable roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side/top view focusing on the roof shingles and chimney, with a glimpse of the front window and door.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door with latch, no porch, and a small step at the base.
